info.name: Oracle Database Oracle SODA (Simple Oracle Document Access) REST API

description.content:
NoSQL-style document access API for Oracle Database. SODA for REST provides HTTP operations for managing JSON document collections, enabling CRUD operations, querying by example (QBE), bulk operations, and index management through a RESTful interface built on Oracle REST Data Services.

Contact Support:
 Name: Oracle Support
 Email: support@oracle.com
